title: '2x GovHack Winner'
description: '1x National Winner, 1x State Winner, 1x National Runner Up & 2x Honourable Mentions'
image: 'data:image/png;base64,'
link: 'https://govhack.org/2022-winners/'
order: 2
---

Multiple award wins at GovHack, Australia's leading open data hackathon:

## Awards

- **1x National Winner** - Top prize across all Australian entries
- **1x State Winner** - Best project in state competition
- **1x National Runner Up** - Second place nationally
- **2x Honourable Mentions** - Recognition for innovative solutions

## About GovHack

GovHack is an annual competition that brings together developers, designers, and innovators to create solutions using government open data. Participants have 48 hours to build projects that address real-world challenges and demonstrate innovative uses of public data.

## Notable Project

The Croc-Spot project was one of these award-winning entries, demonstrating innovation in public safety through technology and open data integration.
